description: A dark announcement graphic. The background is a near-black textured surface with faint stenciled numerals and crosshair-style markings (small '10' reticle ticks and a faint vertical reticle line). Centered at top is the White House mark: a small white line engraving of the White House building above the words 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and 'WASHINGTON' in white serif type. Below in a white monospace/typewriter typeface is the headline: 'Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort'. Beneath that is a bold red rectangular banner with white text 'WAR.GOV/UFO'.
notable_text: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort / WAR.GOV/UFO
